docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, LAWRENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUNG, TRI $4,568.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,620.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, LAWRENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUNG, TRI $9,356.81 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,356.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,618.00 FILED BY LEE, LAWRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, TRI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED MAR-30-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, TRI

COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LAWRENCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
